title: Perfnique Modern Farmhouse Lantern Decor, 15'' 13'' Set of 2 Black Metal Lanterns, 2 LED 6hr Timer Flickering Flameless Candles, Lanterns Decorative for Outdoor Decor, Home, Indoor, Patio (Black)
features: What's included: Our decorative candle lanterns are crafted from premium metal materials, these lanterns are designed to be durable and safe. The set includes two lanterns and two candles: one large lantern holder measuring 11.5 x 11.5 x 38 cm, and a small lantern holder measuring 10 x 10 x 32 cm. One large candle measuring 12.5 x 7.5 cm, and a small candle measuring 10 x 7.5 cm. Each candle requires 3 AAA batteries (Batteries are NOT included).

6-hour Timer Function: Our Lantern comes with flameless timed candles that replicate the natural flickering effect of real candles without the worry of fire hazards. Simply switch it on at your desired time, and the candles will automatically turn off after approximately 6 hours, then automatically light up at the same time the following day. The timed function extends battery life, allowing you to enjoy the beautiful glow effortlessly.

Modern Farmhouse Lanterns for All Decor Styles: The Black Metal Lantern features a simple yet stylish design. You can hang them on the wall by the hanging ring, also can be used as a captivating centerpiece on your dining table, whether it's your front porch, front door, outdoor, indoor, dining table, garden, patio or fireplace mantle. It seamlessly complements any decor style for any occasion!

Perfect Gift: As a thoughtful gift for holidays, birthdays, Christmas, Weddings, Anniversaries, Parties, House Warming, or special occasions, Let your friends, family, or business partners experience the joy of candlelight and create cherished memories together.

Hassle-free Customer Service: We are committed to providing top-notch customer service. Should you have any questions or requests, feel free to contact our dedicated customer support team. We are here to assist you with utmost care and satisfaction.
description: Product Description Perfnique Modern Farmhouse Lantern Decor Welcome to our Porch Lantern Collection, where style meets functionality to create a warm and inviting ambiance for your outdoor living space. Crafted with the finest materials, our lanterns are designed to add a touch of elegance to your front porch, outdoor, patio, fireplace mantle, or garden. Details of the Farmhouse Lanterns Decorative Our Black Metal Lanterns crafted with high-quality metal. The simple design makes cleaning a breeze and gives you tons of options for DIY decor. The simple design makes cleaning a breeze and gives you tons of options for DIY decor. Dimensions Package Includes: 2 x Black Metal Lanterns & 2 x Timer Candles Small Lantern 3.9'' x 3.9'' x 13'' Large Lantern 4.5'' x 4.5'' x 15'' Small Candle 3.9'' x 2.95'' Large Candle 4.9'' x 2.95'' Details of the Timer Flameless Candles 6-hour Timer Function: Our LED candles are equipped with a convenient timer function. Simply switch it on at your desired time, and it will automatically turn on at the same time every night and stay lit for approximately 6 hours. With our battery-powered candle featuring the TIMER function, you can enjoy the luxury of not having to manually turn on your decorative lamp every evening. Advantages: Experience the best of both worlds with our LED candles - all the charm of traditional candles without any drawbacks. Say goodbye to hot wax, smoke, and worries about forgetting to blow out the candles before bed. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor decor, these flameless candles can be easily removed from the holder for table settings. Each candle is powered by 3 AAA batteries ( batteries not included). Unique Decorative Candle Lantern for Indoor & Outdoor Outdoor Decor Dining Table Decor Decorative Candle Lanterns for Seasonal Front Porch Decor Perfect Gift for Any Occasion These simple metal lanterns also make fantastic gifts for Birthdays, Halloween, Christmas, Housewarmings, Weddings, Anniversaries or any celebration.
